title: coreopsis woytkowskii
intro: Coreopsis woytkowskii, also known as Woytkowski's tickseed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, characterized by its bright yellow petals and dark centers. Traditionally, Coreopsis woytkowskii has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its saponin and flavonoid content. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions, and supporting digestive health. Coreopsis woytkowskii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
